ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the race in the F1 calendar */,
  "country" INTEGER /* Reference to the country table */,
  "city" INTEGER /* Reference to the city table */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circuit table */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date when the race occurred */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the race */,
  "circuit_length_km" REAL /* Length of the circuit in kilometers */,
  "race_distance_km" REAL /* Total race distance in kilometers */,
  "lap_record" TEXT /* Fastest lap time recorded on this circuit */,
  "record_owner" TEXT /* Driver who holds the lap record */,
  "record_year" INTEGER /* Year when the lap record was set */,
  "turns" INTEGER /* Number of turns in the circuit */,
  "drs_zones" INTEGER /* Number of DRS zones in the circuit */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., planned, in progress, finished, cancelled) */,
  "track_temperature" REAL /* Track temperature during the race */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature during the race */,
  "track_conditions" TEXT /* Track conditions during the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the circuit */,
  "first_gp_year" INTEGER /* Year of the first Grand Prix held at the circuit */,
  "track_layout" TEXT /* Description of the track layout */,
  "elevation_changes" TEXT /* Description of the elevation changes on the track */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Description of the track surface */,
  "last_renovated" TEXT /* Date of the last renovation */,
  "track_width" REAL /* Width of the track in meters */,
  "pits" INTEGER /* Number of pit boxes available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country table */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team table */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "driver_number" INTEGER /* Driver's race number */,
  "career_start" TEXT /* Start of the driver's career */,
  "career_end" TEXT /* End of the driver's career */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the driver */,
  "podiums" INTEGER /* Number of podium finishes by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "base" TEXT /* Location of the team's base */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Name of the team's principal */,
  "est_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race table */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver table */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the driver */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned in the race */,
  "grid_position" INTEGER /* Starting grid position */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed */,
  "fastest_lap" TEXT /* Fastest lap time in the race */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the driver (e.g., finished, retired) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Total race time of the driver */,
  "pit_stops" INTEGER /* Number of pit stops made by the driver */,
  "tyres_used" TEXT /* Types of tyres used during the race */,
  "fuel_strategy" TEXT /* Fuel strategy used by the driver */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Distance covered by the driver in the race */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the driver during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, journalist, team member) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the race data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lap_times" (
  "lap_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lap time */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race table */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver table */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Number of the lap */,
  "lap_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the lap */,
  "tyre_compound" TEXT /* Tyre compound used during the lap */,
  "fuel_load" REAL /* Fuel load at the start of the lap */,
  "pit_stop" INTEGER /* Indicates if the lap included a pit stop */,
  "lap_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the lap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lap_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lap_times_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lap_times_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)
